title.1: Business Development Executive – Software Sales & Partner Association

description.0:
**Job Title: UI Developer (React) – Fresher / Internship Experience**

**Location:** Kolkata  
**Experience:** Internship Experience - 2 years  
**Employment Type:** Full-Time

Job Overview

We are looking for a **UI Developer with strong frontend coding skills** who can convert provided designs into responsive web pages. The role focuses on **implementation of UI using React and frontend technologies**, not design creation.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Develop user interfaces using **React.js**
* Convert **design layouts into responsive web pages**
* Write clean and structured code using **HTML, CSS, and JavaScript**
* Ensure **mobile-friendly and responsive design across devices**
* Work closely with the development team to integrate UI with backend systems
* Maintain consistency and performance of web interfaces
* Debug and improve existing frontend components

**Required Skills**

* Strong knowledge of **HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript**
* Basic to intermediate understanding of **React.js**
* Good understanding of **responsive web design**
* Ability to convert UI layouts into working webpages
* Understanding of **cross-browser compatibility**

**Preferred Qualifications**

* Internship or project experience in **React development**
* Knowledge of **Git / version control**
* Familiarity with **modern CSS frameworks (Bootstrap / Tailwind)**

**Candidate Profile**

* Quick learner with attention to detail
* Strong interest in frontend development
* Ability to work in a team environment
* Willingness to grow and improve technical skills
* How to Apply

Interested candidates can share their resumes at:  
**talentacquisition@devantitsolutions.com**  
**Contact:** 7605004250

Job Types: Full-time, Permanent, Fresher

Pay: ₹10,000.00 - ₹22,000.00 per month

Benefits:

* Health insurance
* Provident Fund

Experience:

* HTML: 1 year (Required)
* CSS: 1 year (Required)
* Responsive web design: 1 year (Required)
* React Framework: 1 year (Required)

Work Location: In person
description.1:
Company Overview

**oRRbit™ Slickteq Softech Pvt. Ltd.** (www.oRRbit.in) is an Indian software development company established in **2016**, specializing in **industry-specific business management software solutions**.

We have developed **15+ ready-to-use software products** used by businesses across sectors such as:

* Education
* Healthcare
* Retail
* Manufacturing
* Service Businesses

Our solutions help businesses **organize operations, manage data efficiently, and improve productivity.**

Job Role

We are looking for a **Business Development Executive** who can handle **software sales and partner association activities**.

The role requires **lead calling, requirement understanding, software explanation, follow-ups, and converting enquiries into customers or business partners.**

This is a **target-driven sales role**, ideal for candidates who are confident in **B2B communication and structured follow-up work.**

Key ResponsibilitiesLead Management

* Call potential business leads to understand their requirements
* Handle **inbound enquiries from ads, website, and WhatsApp**
* Conduct **outbound cold calling to generate new leads**

Software Sales

* Explain software features, pricing, and business benefits clearly
* Share product information, brochures, and quotations
* Coordinate with the technical team for **product demos**

Partner Association

* Identify potential **software resellers, channel partners, and distributors**
* Explain the **oRRbit Partner Program Model**
* Onboard partners who can promote and sell software in their region

Follow-Ups & Closures

* Maintain regular follow-ups with interested prospects
* Handle objections and close deals within pricing guidelines

Reporting & Documentation

* Maintain lead records in **CRM / Google Sheets**
* Submit **daily activity reports** including calls, follow-ups, demos, and closures

Candidate Requirements

* Minimum **2 years of experience in Software / IT / B2B Sales**
* Experience in **Partner Association or Channel Sales preferred**
* Strong communication skills in **Hindi and English**
* Comfortable with **daily calling targets and structured follow-ups**
* Basic computer knowledge (**CRM, Google Sheets, Email, WhatsApp communication**)
* Self-motivated and **target-oriented personality**

Compensation

* **Fixed Salary:** ₹20,000 – ₹40,000 per month (depending on experience)
* **Performance Incentives** based on sales and partner onboarding
* Opportunity to grow into **Senior Business Development or Sales Manager roles**

Probation Period

The **first 6 months** will be considered a probation period. During this period we evaluate:

* Communication quality
* Target achievement
* Follow-up discipline
* Partner association capability
* Contribution to overall sales growth

Why Join oRRbit™

* Work with a **growing Indian software company (since 2016)**
* Opportunity to sell **multiple business software products**
* Exposure to **B2B sales and partner network development**
* Long-term career growth opportunities

Job Types: Full-time, Permanent

Pay: ₹20,000.00 - ₹40,000.00 per month

Benefits:

* Internet reimbursement
* Work from home

Application Question(s):

* Have you done a BBA or an MBA?
* Which type of sales experience do you have?

* B2B Software Sales
* Telecalling / Inside Sales
* SaaS Sales
* Channel / Partner Sales
* Field Sales
* Other
* Are you comfortable with daily outbound calling and structured follow-ups?

* Yes
* No
* Have you worked on onboarding resellers, distributors, or channel partners before?

* Yes
* No
* Have you handled inbound leads from ads, website enquiries, or WhatsApp before?

* Yes
* No
* Are you comfortable maintaining lead records in CRM or Google Sheets?

* Yes
* No
* Are you available to work from office?

* Yes
* No
* This role involves sales targets and daily calling. Are you comfortable working in a target-driven environment?

* Yes
* No
* How soon can you join if selected?

* Immediately
* Within 15 days
* Within 30 days
* More than 30 days

Education:

* Bachelor's (Required)

Experience:

* Software Sales: 2 years (Required)
* Software Partner Association: 1 year (Required)

Language:

* Bengali, Hindi & English (Required)

Location:

* Kolkata, West Bengal (Required)

Shift availability:

* Day Shift (Required)

Work Location: In person
description.2:
**Job Title:** Senior Software Developer

**Company:** Need82 Travels Pvt. Ltd.  
**Location:** Bararsat / Remote / Hybrid  
**Job Type:** Part-Time / Contract  
**Experience Required:** 5+ Years

**Job Overview-**

Need82 Travels Pvt. Ltd. is looking for an experienced Part-Time Senior Software Developer to support the development and maintenance of the company’s digital platforms. The role involves working on website development, booking systems, CRM integration, and internal automation tools to improve operational efficiency in the travel and tourism business.

The candidate will collaborate with management and operations teams to develop scalable and efficient software solutions for the company.

**Key Responsibilities-**

**Software & Web Development**

* Develop and maintain company websites and web applications.
* Build and improve online travel booking systems for flights, hotels, tour packages, and visa services.
* Ensure smooth functionality and performance of company platforms.

**System Integration**

* Integrate third-party APIs such as:
* Airline booking APIs
* Hotel booking systems
* Payment gateways
* Improve system automation and workflow efficiency.

**Database Management**

* Maintain and optimize databases and backend systems.
* Ensure data security, backup, and system reliability.

**Technical Support**

* Provide technical troubleshooting and system maintenance.
* Ensure regular updates and security improvements.
* Maintain system documentation.

**Collaboration**

* Coordinate with operations, marketing, and management teams.
* Provide technical guidance for new digital initiatives.

**Required Skills-**

**Programming Languages**

* JavaScript
* Python
* Java
* PHP

**Technologies & Frameworks**

* Node.js / React.js / Angular
* Laravel / Django / Spring Boot

**Database**

* MySQL
* PostgreSQL
* MongoDB

**Additional Skills**

* API Integration
* Website Management
* System Security & Performance Optimization
* Cloud platforms (AWS / Azure / Google Cloud – optional)

**Qualification-**

* Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science / IT / Software Engineering or related field.
* Minimum 5 years experience in software or web development.

**Work Structure-**

* Part-Time engagement (Flexible hours)
* Work may be remote or office-based depending on project requirements.

**How to Apply-**

Interested candidates can send their **updated CV and portfolio** to:

**humanresources@need82.in**

**Subject Line:** Application for *Senior Software Developer – Need82 Travels Pvt. Ltd.*

Pay: ₹10,000.00 - ₹92,043.91 per month

Work Location: In person
description.3:
Job Title: Software Engineering Intern (Trading Technology)

Location: Central Kolkata

Experience: 0-6 months

Education: B.Tech in Computer Science or Related Feild

Job Description :

We are seeking a highly motivated and technically curious Software Engineering Intern to join our development team. This role is designed for a fresh B.Tech graduate who is passionate about the intersection of finance and technology. You will work on building, debugging, and optimizing high-performance trading tools and services that power the global financial markets.

Key Responsibilities :

❖ Development: Assist in developing and maintaining automated trading systems (EAs) and financial web applications.

❖ Optimization: Help optimize existing code for speed and reliability, ensuring low-latency execution.

❖ Testing & Debugging: Conduct rigorous backtesting of trading strategies and troubleshoot technical issues within the trading environment.

❖ Research: Stay updated on emerging technologies in fintech, including MQL, pine script, Python, and API integrations.

❖ Collaboration: Work closely with senior developers and the marketing team to implement technical SEO improvements across our web platforms.

Required Skills & Qualifications :

❖ Education: Recently completed B.Tech in Computer Science (2024/2025 batch preferred).

❖ Programming: Strong foundational knowledge in at least one language (Node Js, Java Script, C++, Python, pine

script or Java). Familiarity with Web tech is a significant plus.

❖ Logic: Exceptional problem-solving skills and a strong grasp of data structures and algorithms.

❖ Communication: Ability to document technical processes clearly and collaborate within a team.

❖ Drive: A "self-starter" attitude with a hunger to learn about the Forex and FinTech industry.

What We Offer :

❖ Hands-on experience with real-world trading technology and high-traffic web platforms.

❖ Mentorship from experienced developers and industry experts.

❖ A fast-paced, entrepreneurial environment where your contributions are visible.

❖ Immediate joiners preferred

❖ Certificate of Internship and a potential Full-Time Offer based on performance.

Contact :

Hr Department : +917890712365

Location: Central Kolkata

Stippend: Rs. 6,000 - Rs. 11,000

Work Location: In person ( Kolkata )

Job Types: Full-time, Fresher, Internship  
Contract length: 3-6 months

Pay: ₹6,000.00 - ₹11,000.00 per month

Work Location: In person
